hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.h$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ ^build/ ]]; then python tools/format_ar.py "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; CLANG_FORMAT="/c/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Community/VC/Tools/Llvm/x64/bin/clang-format.exe"; if [ -x "$CLANG_FORMAT" ]; then "$CLANG_FORMAT" -i "$FILE"; fi; elif [[ "$FILE" =~ \.cpp$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ ^build/ ]]; then CLANG_FORMAT="/c/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Community/VC/Tools/Llvm/x64/bin/clang-format.exe"; if [ -x "$CLANG_FORMAT" ]; then "$CLANG_FORMAT" -i "$FILE"; fi; fi'
